product_category: AI inbound conversion agent for B2B websites
one_line_summary: Docket AI Marketing Agent turns anonymous website traffic into qualified pipeline through real-time, knowledge-grounded conversations.
ideal_customer_profile: B2B software companies with meaningful inbound website traffic, complex evaluation questions, and a need to qualify buyers before routing them to sales.
core_problem: High-intent website visitors leave without converting when forms and legacy chat cannot answer real evaluation questions in the moment.
key_capabilities: Answers buyer questions from approved knowledge sources only
Qualifies inbound buyers through structured discovery during conversation
Routes and books meetings into CRM and scheduling systems
Writes conversation context back to Salesforce and HubSpot
differentiators: Grounded responses from approved knowledge instead of generic chatbot replies
Designed for B2B evaluation-stage questions across pricing, integrations, security, and use-case fit
Captures qualification context before routing buyers to the right human
proof_points: Supports Salesforce, HubSpot, Calendly, Chili Piper, RevenueHero, and Slack integrations
terminology_guardrails: Use 'Marketing Agent' as the product name.
Treat 'Agent Qualified Lead' and 'AQL' as internal terms unless the audience already knows them.
avoid_claims: Do not claim outbound prospecting or cold-email automation.
Do not imply the product is self-serve if onboarding is white-glove.
default_cta: Worth a 15-minute look next week if improving inbound conversion is on the roadmap?
